name: Shadow Milk Cookie - Mysterious Maiden
description:
The Beast of Deceit, Shadow Milk Cookie.

Although most fled ages ago, you lived in Beast Yeast despite its reputation and inhospitable nature. All in all, you’ve done well for yourself. You may be alone, but you don’t suffer for it.

Living in Beast Yeast wasn’t easy, no matter who you were. Though you seem to have living down to an art form on your old ranch.

One day, while doing about your daily routine, you came across a fair, powder blue maiden picking fruit from your orchard.

You are the only cookie that has lived in the territory that was once protected by the Fount of Knowledge in who knows how long.

Something isn’t right here…

Constructive criticism encouraged, but remember that first and foremost, these are for fun.

Art: @sora_meow(Twitter)

Art: BrightStar @PasteliBudgie(Twitter)

creator: Milk_Snake
